proof:
refine' ⟨by norm_num [Nat.ModEq, Nat.mod_eq_of_lt], fun y hy => _⟩
  rw [Set.mem_setOf] at hy
  norm_num [Nat.ModEq] at hy
  omega
failed_attempts:
refine' ⟨by norm_num [Nat.ModEq, Nat.mod_eq_of_lt], fun x hx => _⟩
  rw [Nat.ModEq] at hx
  have h₁ : 30 * x % 47 = 42 % 47 := hx
  norm_num at h₁
  have h₂ : 30 * x % 47 = 42 := h₁
  have h₃ : x ≥ 39 := by
    contrapose! h₂
    have h₄ : x < 39 := h₂
    interval_cases x <;> norm_num at h₂ ⊢
  exact h₃

refine' ⟨by norm_num [Nat.ModEq, Nat.mod_eq_of_lt], fun x hx => _⟩
  rw [Nat.ModEq] at hx
  have h₁ : 30 * x % 47 = 42 := hx
  have h₂ : 30 * 39 % 47 = 42 := by norm_num
  have h₃ : 0 < 47 := by norm_num
  have h₄ : 30.gcd 47 = 1 := by norm_num
  have h₅ : x ≥ 39 := by
    contrapose! h₁
    have h₆ : x < 39 := h₁
    interval_cases x <;> norm_num at h₁ ⊢
  exact h₅

refine' ⟨by norm_num [Nat.ModEq, Nat.mod_eq_of_lt], fun x hx => _⟩
  rw [Nat.ModEq] at hx
  norm_num at hx
  have h₁ : 30 * x % 47 = 42 := hx
  have h₂ : 30 * 39 % 47 = 42 := by norm_num
  have h₃ : 30 * x ≡ 30 * 39 [MOD 47] := by
    rw [Nat.ModEq]
    omega
  have h₄ : x ≡ 39 [MOD 47] := by
    apply Nat.ModEq.mul_left_cancel
    · decide
    · exact h₃
  rw [Nat.ModEq] at h₄
  omega

refine' ⟨by norm_num [Nat.ModEq, Nat.mod_eq_of_lt], fun y hy => _⟩
  rw [Nat.ModEq] at hy
  have : 30 * y % 47 = 42 % 47 := by omega
  have : 30 * y % 47 = 42 := by norm_num at this ⊢; assumption
  have : y ≥ 39 := by
    contrapose! this
    interval_cases y <;> norm_num [Nat.mul_mod, Nat.mod_eq_of_lt] at this ⊢
  exact this

  rw [Set.mem_setOf] at hy

  have h₁ : 30 * y % 47 = 42 % 47 := hy
  norm_num at h₁

  have h₃ : 30 * y ≡ 30 * 39 [MOD 47] := by
    rw [Nat.ModEq]
    omega

refine' ⟨by norm_num [Nat.ModEq, Nat.mod_eq_of_lt], fun x hx => _⟩
  rw [Nat.ModEq] at hx
  have h₁ : 30 * x % 47 = 42 % 47 := hx
  norm_num at h₁
  have h₂ : 30 * x % 47 = 42 := h₁
  have h₃ : 30 * 39 % 47 = 42 := by norm_num
  have h₄ : ∀ y : ℕ, 30 * y % 47 = 42 → y ≥ 39 := by
    intro y hy
    have h₅ : 30 * y ≡ 30 * 39 [MOD 47] := by
      rw [Nat.ModEq]
      omega
    have h₆ : 30 * (y - 39) ≡ 0 [MOD 47] := by
      simpa [Nat.ModEq, Nat.mul_sub_left_distrib] using h₅
    have h₇ : 47 ∣ 30 * (y - 39) := Nat.ModEq.zero_iff_dvd.mp h₆
    have h₈ : Nat.gcd 30 47 = 1 := by norm_num
    have h₉ : 47 ∣ (y - 39) := Nat.dvd_of_mul_right_dvd h₈ h₇
    have h₁₀ : y - 39 ≥ 0 := Nat.zero_le _
    have h₁₁ : y ≥ 39 := by
      omega
    exact h₁₁
  exact h₄ x h₂

  have h₃ : y ≥ 39 := by

    have h₄ : y < 39 := h₁
    interval_cases y <;> norm_num at h₁ ⊢
  exact h₃

    omega

    apply Nat.ModEq.mul_left_cancel
    · decide
    · exact h₃
  have h₅ : y ≥ 39 := by
    cases' h₄ with k hk
    omega
  exact h₅
